description: Module add applied — Offers, which needs no customer-side setup (composer is in the dashboard, no external account needed); £19 setup + £6/mo, sub went from £17 → £23

expected.subject: Offers is live on your account
expected.body:
Hi Priya,

Good news — Offers is now active on your account.

What just landed on your bill:
  • One-off setup for Offers: £19
    (already added to the invoice you just paid)
  • Module subscription: +£6/month

Your subscription:
  • Before: £17/month
  • Now:    £23/month (+£6)

No set-up needed on your side — Offers just appears
on your site / in your dashboard from today.

Any questions, hit reply.

— ModuForge
